strings.ECLIPSE_GAMEMODE_DESCRIPTION:
<style=cIsUtility>Eclipse</style> lusus modus est qui addit positis provocationem adiectiua ad currendum tuum.

Quotiens tu <style=cIsUtility> ludum</style> verberas, gradus Eclipsis tua <style=cIsUtility>@</style> semper auget cum illo superstite, usque ad maximum temporis temporis.
strings.ECLIPSE_1_DESCRIPTION:
Incipit difficultas collocantur Monsoon.<style=cSub>

<mspace=0.5em>(1</mspace> Socius Satus: <style=cIsHealth>-50%</style>@H3@@
